indicators.name: freestanding bathtub
indicators.rationale: A freestanding bathtub occupies a significant portion of the floor space, leaving little room for yoga mat placement.

indicators.name: dark wooden floor
indicators.rationale: A dark wooden floor can be slippery when wet, which is not ideal for yoga practice.

indicators.name: cabinets and drawers
indicators.rationale: Cabinets and drawers are closed and do not provide any space for yoga props like blocks or straps.

indicators.name: hardwood flooring
indicators.rationale: Hardwood flooring provides a firm, non-slip base surface suitable for yoga mat placement.

indicators.name: open floor area
indicators.rationale: There is an open floor area available for yoga practice, although it is limited.

indicators.name: potted plant
indicators.rationale: A potted plant is present but does not significantly obstruct the floor space.

reasoning_summary: The scene is marginally adequate for yoga practice due to the presence of a freestanding bathtub and limited open floor space. The hardwood flooring is suitable for yoga, but the cabinets and drawers limit the space for props. The open floor area is limited, and the potted plant does not significantly obstruct the space.
